allow: PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173,5174,5175,5176,5177,5178,5179,5180,8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns | Select-Object LocalPort, OwningProcess, @{N='ProcName';E={\(Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).ProcessName}}, @{N='CWD';E={\(Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Path}} | Sort-Object LocalPort -Unique | Format-Table -AutoSize } else { "no listeners on 5173-5180 / 8000" })

PowerShell($deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(20\); while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\) { $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { break }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500 }; $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \(-not $c\) { "no vite on 5173 yet"; exit }; $cinfo = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$\($c.OwningProcess\)"; "vite PID: $\($c.OwningProcess\)"; "cmdline: $\($cinfo.CommandLine\)")

PowerShell($wt='D:\\Users\\hanerlv\\Documents\\workspace\\lego_cad_sim\\.claude\\worktrees\\zen-williams-3e785b'; $main='D:\\Users\\hanerlv\\Documents\\workspace\\lego_cad_sim'; $wnm=Join-Path $wt 'frontend\\node_modules'; if \(-not \(Test-Path $wnm\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Junction -Path $wnm -Target \(Join-Path $main 'frontend\\node_modules'\) | Out-Null; Write-Output 'junction created' } else { Write-Output 'junction exists' })
